steps.title: Identify the stronger relevance
steps.content: The explanation in the passage says doctors' credentials may have mattered, but participants may have cared more about experiential relevance. Former trial volunteers had personally gone through what prospective volunteers were considering.

steps.title: Do not change the mechanism
steps.content: Choice A shifts to message positivity. Choice B says participants lacked enough experience to evaluate doctors' messages. Choice D says participants were skeptical of doctors' credentials, but the passage says those credentials were outweighed. The key is same-experience relevance. The answer is C.
